variables.$fxv#0:
<policies>
  <inbound>
    <base />
    <set-variable name="allowedOids" value="{{allowed-oids}}" />
    <set-variable name="allowedCidrs" value="{{allowed-cidrs}}" />
    <set-variable name="requestTimestamp" value="@(DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o"))" />
    <set-variable name="requestId" value="@(context.RequestId.ToString())" />
    <set-variable name="correlationId" value="@(context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-ms-client-request-id", context.RequestId.ToString()))" />
    <set-header name="x-correlation-id" exists-action="override"><value>@((string)context.Variables["correlationId"])</value></set-header>
    <rate-limit-by-key calls="60" renewal-period="60" counter-key="@(context.Request.IpAddress)" />
    <set-variable name="ipAllowed" value="@{
      var configured = ((string)context.Variables["allowedCidrs"]);
      if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(configured) || configured == "*") return true;
      var rawIp = context.Request.IpAddress;
      foreach (var entry in configured.Split(';')) {
        var cidr = entry.Trim();
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(cidr)) continue;
        if (cidr == rawIp) return true;
        var slash = cidr.IndexOf('/');
        if (slash < 0) continue;
        var clientIp = System.Net.IPAddress.Parse(rawIp);
        var networkAddr = System.Net.IPAddress.Parse(cidr.Substring(0, slash));
        var prefixLen = int.Parse(cidr.Substring(slash + 1));
        var nb = networkAddr.GetAddressBytes();
        var cb = clientIp.GetAddressBytes();
        if (nb.Length != 4 || cb.Length != 4) continue;
        uint mask = prefixLen == 0 ? 0 : 0xFFFFFFFFu << (32 - prefixLen);
        uint netInt = ((uint)nb[0] << 24) | ((uint)nb[1] << 16) | ((uint)nb[2] << 8) | nb[3];
        uint cipInt = ((uint)cb[0] << 24) | ((uint)cb[1] << 16) | ((uint)cb[2] << 8) | cb[3];
        if ((cipInt & mask) == (netInt & mask)) return true;
      }
      return false;
    }" />
    <choose><when condition="@(!((bool)context.Variables["ipAllowed"]))"><return-response><set-status code="403" reason="Forbidden" /><set-body>{"error":{"code":"403","message":"IP address is not allowed"}}</set-body></return-response></when></choose>
    <validate-jwt header-name="Authorization" failed-validation-httpcode="401" failed-validation-error-message="Unauthorized: Invalid or missing Bearer token">
      <openid-config url="https://login.microsoftonline.com/{{tenant-id}}/v2.0/.well-known/openid-configuration" />
      <issuers><issuer>https://login.microsoftonline.com/{{tenant-id}}/v2.0</issuer><issuer>https://sts.windows.net/{{tenant-id}}/</issuer></issuers>
      <required-claims><claim name="oid" /></required-claims>
    </validate-jwt>
    <set-variable name="jwt" value="@(context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Authorization", "").Replace("Bearer ", "").AsJwt())" />
    <set-variable name="oid" value="@(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("oid", ""))" />
    <set-variable name="tid" value="@(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("tid", ""))" />
    <set-variable name="sub" value="@(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("sub", ""))" />
    <set-variable name="appid" value="@(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("appid", ""))" />
    <set-variable name="azp" value="@(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("azp", ""))" />
    <set-variable name="oidAuthorized" value="@{
      var configured = ((string)context.Variables["allowedOids"]);
      if (configured == "*") return true;
      var oid = (string)context.Variables["oid"];
      foreach (var entry in configured.Split(';')) { if (entry.Trim() == oid) return true; }
      return false;
    }" />
    <choose><when condition="@(!((bool)context.Variables["oidAuthorized"]))"><return-response><set-status code="403" reason="Forbidden" /><set-body>{"error":{"code":"403","message":"User is not authorized"}}</set-body></return-response></when></choose>
    <set-backend-service backend-id="foundry-backend" />
    <authentication-managed-identity resource="https://cognitiveservices.azure.com/" client-id="{{managed-identity-client-id}}" />
  </inbound>
  <backend><base /></backend>
  <outbound>
    <base />
    <set-variable name="responseBody" value="@{ try { return context.Response.Body.As<string>(preserveContent: true); } catch { return "{}"; } }" />
    <set-variable name="promptTokens" value="@{ try { return Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["responseBody"])["usage"]?["prompt_tokens"]?.ToString() ?? "0"; } catch { return "0"; } }" />
    <set-variable name="completionTokens" value="@{ try { return Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["responseBody"])["usage"]?["completion_tokens"]?.ToString() ?? "0"; } catch { return "0"; } }" />
    <set-variable name="totalTokens" value="@{ try { return Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["responseBody"])["usage"]?["total_tokens"]?.ToString() ?? "0"; } catch { return "0"; } }" />
    <set-variable name="model" value="@{ try { return Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse((string)context.Variables["responseBody"])["model"]?.ToString() ?? ""; } catch { return ""; } }" />
    <set-variable name="deployment" value="@{ var parts = context.Request.Url.Path.Split('/'); var idx = System.Array.IndexOf(parts, "deployments"); return (idx >= 0 && idx + 1 < parts.Length) ? parts[idx + 1] : ""; }" />
    <send-one-way-request mode="new">
      <set-url>{{audit-queue-url}}/messages?visibilitytimeout=0&messagettl=3600</set-url>
      <set-method>POST</set-method>
      <authentication-managed-identity resource="https://storage.azure.com/" client-id="{{managed-identity-client-id}}" />
      <set-header name="x-ms-version" exists-action="override"><value>2023-11-03</value></set-header>
      <set-header name="Content-Type" exists-action="override"><value>application/xml</value></set-header>
      <set-body>@{
        var log = new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject(
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("timestamp", context.Variables["requestTimestamp"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("oid", context.Variables["oid"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("tid", context.Variables["tid"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("sub", context.Variables["sub"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("appid", context.Variables["appid"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("azp", context.Variables["azp"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("model", context.Variables["model"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("deployment", context.Variables["deployment"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("operation", context.Operation != null ? context.Operation.Name : context.Request.Method),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("promptTokens", int.Parse((string)context.Variables["promptTokens"])),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("completionTokens", int.Parse((string)context.Variables["completionTokens"])),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("totalTokens", int.Parse((string)context.Variables["totalTokens"])),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("httpStatus", context.Response.StatusCode),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("backendStatus", context.Response.StatusCode),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("latencyMs", (int)context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("backendLatencyMs", (int)context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("requestId", context.Variables["requestId"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("correlationId", context.Variables["correlationId"]),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("traceparent", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("traceparent", "")),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("clientIp", context.Request.IpAddress),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("userAgent", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("User-Agent", "")),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("xMsClientRequestId", context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-ms-client-request-id", "")),
          new Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JProperty("xMsRequestId", context.Response.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("x-ms-request-id", ""))
        ).ToString(Newtonsoft.Json.Formatting.None);
        return "<QueueMessage><MessageText>" + System.Convert.ToBase64String(System.Text.Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(log)) + "</MessageText></QueueMessage>";
      }</set-body>
    </send-one-way-request>
  </outbound>
  <on-error><base /></on-error>
</policies>

content.json:
# Azure OpenAI 利用監査ダッシュボード
APIMおよびAzure Functionsのログから取得したLLMの利用統計情報です。

content.query:
AppTraces
| extend msg = parse_json(message)
| where isnotnull(msg.timestamp) and isnotnull(msg.requestId)
| extend StatusCode = toint(msg.statusCode)
| summarize TotalRequests = count(), ErrorRequests = countif(StatusCode >= 400)
| extend SuccessRate = round(todouble(TotalRequests - ErrorRequests) * 100.0 / TotalRequests, 2)
| project TotalRequests, ErrorRequests, SuccessRate = strcat(SuccessRate, "%")
content.title: 全体の概要統計 (リクエスト数 / エラー数 / 成功率)

content.query:
AppTraces
| extend msg = parse_json(message)
| where isnotnull(msg.timestamp) and isnotnull(msg.requestId)
| extend Timestamp = todatetime(msg.timestamp),
         TotalTokens = toint(msg.totalTokens)
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(TotalTokens) by bin(Timestamp, 1d)
| order by Timestamp asc
content.title: 日次 Token 利用推移

content.query:
AppTraces
| extend msg = parse_json(message)
| where isnotnull(msg.timestamp) and isnotnull(msg.requestId)
| extend OID = tostring(msg.oid),
         TotalTokens = toint(msg.totalTokens)
| summarize TotalUsage = sum(TotalTokens) by OID
| order by TotalUsage desc
content.title: ユーザー別 (OID) 累積 Token 利用量

content.query:
AppTraces
| extend msg = parse_json(message)
| where isnotnull(msg.timestamp) and isnotnull(msg.requestId)
| extend Model = tostring(msg.model),
         TotalTokens = toint(msg.totalTokens)
| summarize TotalUsage = sum(TotalTokens) by Model
| order by TotalUsage desc
content.title: モデル別利用比率

content.query:
AppTraces
| extend msg = parse_json(message)
| where isnotnull(msg.timestamp) and isnotnull(msg.requestId)
| extend ResponseTimeMs = toint(msg.responseTimeMs)
| summarize Avg = avg(ResponseTimeMs), P50 = percentile(ResponseTimeMs, 50), P90 = percentile(ResponseTimeMs, 90), P99 = percentile(ResponseTimeMs, 99)
content.title: 応答速度分析 (ミリ秒)

content.query:
AppTraces
| extend msg = parse_json(message)
| where isnotnull(msg.timestamp) and isnotnull(msg.requestId)
| extend OID = tostring(msg.oid),
         TotalTokens = toint(msg.totalTokens)
| summarize TotalUsage = sum(TotalTokens), RequestCount = count() by OID
| order by TotalUsage desc
| limit 10
content.title: Top 利用者 (上位 10 名)
